violations.text: Spaghetti sauce, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Spaghetti sauce was observed at 70 DF and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
Deli meat was observed held past the date of disposition. Food was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, spaghetti sauce was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Working containers of sugar and flower are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
Walk-in #2 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Working containers of dry spices are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
The wall in the ware washing area is in poor repair, observed peeling and missing pieces. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
